segments.text: To the angel of the assembly in Ephesus write:“He who holds the seven stars in his right hand, he who walks among the seven golden lamp stands says these things:
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: “I know your works, and your toil and perseverance, and that you can’t tolerate evil men, and have tested those who call themselves apostles, and they are not, and found them false.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: You have perseverance and have endured for my name’s sake, and have[^10] not grown weary.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: But I have this against you, that you left your first love.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Remember therefore from where you have fallen, and repent and do the first works; or else I am coming to you swiftly, and will move your lamp st and out of its place, unless you repent.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: But this you have, that you hate the works of the Nicolaitans, which I also hate.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the assemblies. To him who overcomes I will give to eat from the tree of life, which is in the Paradise of my God.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: “To the angel of the assembly in Smyrna write:“The first and the last, who was dead, and has come to life says these things:
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: “I know your works, oppression, and your poverty (but you are rich), and the blasphemy of those who say they are Jews, and they are not, but are a synagogue of Satan.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don’t be afraid of the things which you are about to suffer. Behold, the devil is about to throw some of you into prison, that you may be tested; and you will have oppression for ten days. Be faithful to death, and I will give you the crown of life.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the assemblies. He who overcomes won’t be harmed by the second death.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: “To the angel of the assembly in Pergamum write:“He who has the sharp two-edged sword says these things:
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: “I know your works and where you dwell, where Satan’s throne is. You hold firmly to my name, and didn’t deny my faith in the days of Antipas my witness, my faithful one, who was killed among you, where Satan dwells.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: But I have a few things against you, because you have there some who hold the teaching of Balaam, who taught Balak to throw a stumbling block before the children of Israel, to eat things sacrificed to idols, and to commit sexual immorality.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: So also you likewise have some who hold to the teaching of the Nicolaitans. [^11]
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Repent therefore, or else I am coming to you quickly and I will make war against them with the sword of my mouth.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the assemblies. To him who overcomes, to him I will give of the hidden manna, [^12] and I will give him a white stone, and on the stone a new name written which no one knows but he who receives it.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: “To the angel of the assembly in Thyatira write:“The Son of God, who has his eyes like a flame of fire, and his feet are like burnished brass, says these things:
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: “I know your works, your love, faith, service, patient endurance, and that your last works are more than the first.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: But I have this against you, that you tolerate your[^13] woman Jezebel, who calls herself a prophetess. She teaches and seduces my servants to commit sexual immorality and to eat things sacrificed to idols.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I gave her time to repent, but she refuses to repent of her sexual immorality.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Behold, I will throw her and those who commit adultery with her into a bed of great oppression, unless they repent of her works.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I will kill her children with Death, and all the assemblies will know that I am he who searches the minds and hearts. I will give to each one of you according to your deeds.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: But to you I say, to the rest who are in Thyatira—as many as don’t have this teaching, who don’t know what some call ‘the deep things of Satan’—to you I say, I am not putting any other burden on you.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Nevertheless, hold that which you have firmly until I come.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: He who overcomes, and he who keeps my works to the end, to him I will give authority over the nations.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: He will rule them with a rod of iron, shattering them like clay pots, as I also have received of my Father;
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: and I will give him the morning star.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the assemblies. 

### Footnotes
[^1]: + TR adds “have labored and

segments.text: [^2]: + TR reads
which I hate
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: instead of
likewise
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: [^3]: + Manna is supernatural food, named after the Hebrew for
What is it?
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
. See Exodus 11:7-9.

that
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: instead of
your
segments.speaker: The LORD
